concepts.name: Deque
concepts.short_definition: A linear data structure that allows insertion and deletion from both ends.

concepts.name: Insertion
concepts.short_definition: Adding an element to the deque.

concepts.name: Deletion
concepts.short_definition: Removing an element from the deque.

concepts.name: Front Insertion
concepts.short_definition: Adding an element to the front of the deque.

concepts.name: Rear Insertion
concepts.short_definition: Adding an element to the rear of the deque.

concepts.name: Front Deletion
concepts.short_definition: Removing an element from the front of the deque.

concepts.name: Rear Deletion
concepts.short_definition: Removing an element from the rear of the deque.

concepts.name: Peek Front
concepts.short_definition: Accessing the element at the front of the deque without removing it.

concepts.name: Peek Rear
concepts.short_definition: Accessing the element at the rear of the deque without removing it.

concepts.name: Empty Check
concepts.short_definition: Determining if the deque contains any elements.
